stages.concept:
# Unit 090: 전치사 (시간) in, on, at - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 시간의 전치사 **in, on, at**을 더 자세히 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **at** — 시각, 특정 시점

> **at** 7 o'clock / **at** noon / **at** midnight / **at** night
> **at** the moment / **at** that time / **at** the same time

> I get up **at** 6:30 every morning.
> 나는 매일 아침 6시 30분에 일어난다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **on** — 요일, 날짜, 특정한 날

> **on** Monday / **on** May 5th / **on** Christmas Day
> **on** a rainy day / **on** the morning of July 4th

> We have a test **on** Friday.
> 우리는 금요일에 시험이 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **in** — 월, 계절, 연도, 세기, 하루의 일부, 기간

> **in** January / **in** spring / **in** 2025 / **in** the 21st century
> **in** the morning / **in** the afternoon / **in** the evening

> She was born **in** 2010.
> 그녀는 2010년에 태어났다.

**Q. 다음 중 짝지어진 전치사-시간 명사가 올바르지 않은 것을 고르세요.**
1. on Sunday (요일)
2. at 9 o'clock (특정 시각)
3. at 2025 ✅ (연도는 in 2025)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 연도, 계절, 월처럼 긴 기간에는 **in**을 쓴답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **in + 시간** — ~후에 (미래)

> I'll be back **in** 10 minutes.
> 10분 후에 돌아올게.

🧑‍🎓 학생: at(시각/시점), on(요일/날짜), in(월/계절/연도/기간)! 범위가 작은 것부터 큰 것 순서로 기억하면 되겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 090: 전치사(시간) in, on, at - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
I moved to Busan (     ) 2015.
> **정답** in

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
We have a meeting (     ) Monday.
> **정답** on

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
She wakes up (     ) 7 o'clock.
> **정답** at

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
He was born (     ) March.
> **정답** in

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 쓰시오.
The party is (     ) Saturday evening.
> **정답** on

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I go to school on the morning.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** on → in

---

**07.** She was born at 2005.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** at → in

---

**08.** We have a test in Friday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** in → on

---

**09.** He arrived in 3 o'clock.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** in → at

---

**10.** The concert is at December 25th.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** at → on

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 아침에 운동한다.
I exercise the morning.
> **정답** in

---

**12.** 수업은 9시에 시작한다.
Class starts 9 o'clock.
> **정답** at

---

**13.** 우리는 일요일에 교회에 간다.
We go to church Sunday.
> **정답** on

---

**14.** 그녀는 여름에 수영을 한다.
She swims summer.
> **정답** in

---

**15.** 시험은 10월 15일에 있다.
The test is October 15th.
> **정답** on

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 2010년에 태어났다.
was I born in 2010
> **정답** I / was / born / in / 2010

---

**17.** 우리는 토요일에 만나자.
meet Let's on Saturday
> **정답** Let's / meet / on / Saturday

---

**18.** 그녀는 밤에 공부한다.
She at studies night
> **정답** She / studies / at / night

---

**19.** 꽃은 봄에 핀다.
Flowers bloom in spring
> **정답** Flowers / bloom / in / spring

---

**20.** 수업은 3시 30분에 끝난다.
Class at ends 3:30
> **정답** Class / ends / at / 3:30
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 090: 전치사(시간) in, on, at - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom often go hiking _____ summer.
on
at
for
in
> **정답** in

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy and Tom had lunch _____ noon.
on
in
after
at
> **정답** at

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He was born _____ May 5th.
on
for
at
in
> **정답** on

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I'm going to have a party _____ my birthday.
You can see many flowers _____ spring.
at - in
on - in
on - at
in - on
> **정답** on - in

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He works so late _____ night.
The train leaves _____ seven.
on
in
from
at
> **정답** at

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The store opens at the afternoon.
Tom fell asleep at midnight.
They made an appointment at lunchtime.
Amy gets up at 6:30.
> **정답** The store opens at the afternoon.

---

**07.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를
고르시오.
A: When will the movie be released?
B: Perhaps It will be released _____ June.
at
in
for
on
to
> **정답** in

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I was born on May 13th.
We go to the tennis club on Saturday.
They didn't know that at that time.
My parents will have a party at Christmas day.
> **정답** My parents will have a party at Christmas day.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Einstein was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics on
1921.
at
in
of
on
> **정답** in

---

**10.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를
고르시오.
A: What day are you leaving for Paris?
B: I will take a flight _____ Saturday.
at
in
to
on
> **정답** on

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
I heard a chicken cry in dawn.
of
at
on
to
> **정답** at

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The first snow falls in November.
I left the house at the afternoon.
It rains a lot on summer.
Families gathered in Thanksgiving Day.
> **정답** The first snow falls in November.

---

**13.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를
고르시오.
A: What time does his show start?
B: It starts _____ 4:15.
at
on
in
for
> **정답** at

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Tom is going to go shopping at Saturday morning.
in
for
to
on
> **정답** on

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
The children will go to the amusement park _____
May 5th.
I will have a surprise party _____ his birthday.
to
on
in
at
> **정답** on

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Cell phones became popular _____ the 20th century.
They will get the prize _____ the end of the year.
in - at
on - in
in - on
at - in
> **정답** in - at

---

**17.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
저녁에 우리 가족은 거실에 모였다.
At the evening, my family gathered in the
living room.
In evening, my family gathered in the living
room.
In the evening, my family gathered in the
living room.
On the evening, my family gathered in the
living room.
> **정답** In the evening, my family gathered in the living room.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My grandmother drinks black tea
in 4 p. m.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** in → at

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We will wear Hanbok and go
to my grandparents ' house in
New Year 's Day.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** in → on

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
There is a summer vacation on
July.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** on → in
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 090 전치사(시간) in, on, at중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 전치사 중 알맞은 것을 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
in, on, at
I was born  (     )  March 10, 2010.
정답 on

---

**02.** 주어진 전치사 중 알맞은 것을 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
in, on, at
The Renaissance began  (     )  the 14th century.
• Renaissance 르네상스
정답 in

---

**03.** 주어진 전치사 중 알맞은 것을 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
in, on, at
I will meet you  (     )  noon.
정답 at

---

**04.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 내 생일에 파티를 할 거예요. [my birthday.]
I will have a party  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 on, my, birthday

---

**05.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
겨울에는 눈이 많이 온다. [winter]
It snows a lot  (     )   (     ) .
정답 in, winter

---

**06.** 주어진 전치사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[in, on, at]
A: When will his concert be held?
B: The concert will be held  (     )  May 3rd 
7 p.m.
정답 on, at

---

**07.** 주어진 전치사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[in, on, at]
A: What are you going to do  (     )  Sunday?
B: I'm going to go to the library with my friend
 10 o'clock  (     )  Sunday.
정답 on, at, on

---

**08.** 주어진 전치사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[in, on, at]
A: What time does this train leave?
B: It will depart  (     )  5 p.m.
• depart 출발하다
정답 at

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
베토벤은 1770년 독일에서 태어났다.
Beethoven was born [at]  Germany at 1770.
정답 in

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
나는 8월 5일에 야구 경기를 보러 갈 것이다.
I will go to the baseball game [in]  August 5th.
정답 on

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 090: 전치사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom often goes swimming _____ summer. on at for in
> 정답: in

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy had lunch _____ noon. on in after at
> 정답: at

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She was born _____ March 3rd. on for at in
> 정답: on

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I'm going to have a picnic _____ my birthday.
You can see many birds _____ spring. at - in on - in on - at in - on
> 정답: on - in

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He studies so late _____ night.
The bus leaves _____ eight. on in from at
> 정답: at

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The shop opens at the afternoon.
Amy fell asleep at midnight.
They made a plan at lunchtime.
Tom gets up at 7:00.
> 정답: The shop opens at the afternoon.

---

**07.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
A: When will the concert start?
B: Perhaps it will start _____ July. at in for on to
> 정답: in

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I was born on April 10th.
We go to the art club on Friday.
They didn't know that at that time.
My family will have a gathering at New Year's Day.
> 정답: My family will have a gathering at New Year's Day.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
The Olympic Games were held on 2020. at in of on
> 정답: in

---

**10.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
A: What day are you leaving for Tokyo?
B: I will take a flight _____ Sunday. at in to on
> 정답: on

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
I heard a rooster crow in dawn. of at on to
> 정답: at

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The first frost appears in October.
I left the school at the afternoon.
It rains a lot on summer.
People gathered in Children's Day.
> 정답: The first frost appears in October.

---

**13.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
A: What time does the movie start?
B: It starts _____ 3:30. at on in for
> 정답: at

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Amy is going to go jogging at Sunday morning. in for to on
> 정답: on

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 공통으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
The students will go to the museum _____ June 1st.
I will have a surprise party _____ her birthday. to on in at
> 정답: on

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Smartphones became popular _____ the 21st century.
They will get the result _____ the end of the month. in - at on - in in - on at - in
> 정답: in - at

---

**17.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
아침에 우리 가족은 부엌에 모였다.
At the morning, my family gathered in the kitchen.
In morning, my family gathered in the kitchen.
In the morning, my family gathered in the kitchen.
On the morning, my family gathered in the kitchen.
> 정답: In the morning, my family gathered in the kitchen.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. My  grandfather  drinks  green  tea in  5  p.  m. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: in → at

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. We  will  wear  costumes  and  go to  the  school  festival  in  Halloween. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: in → on

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. There  is  a  winter  vacation  on December. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: on → in
